channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Remothered: Broken Porcelain Remastered announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

The second chapter of the saga, rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5.

Stormind Games has announced Remothered: Broken Porcelain Remastered for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, GOG, Microsoft Store). A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Stormind Games:

About

Remothered: Broken Porcelain Remastered is the second chapter of the saga, with overhauled visuals, lighting, and presentation. Legacy bugs from the original release have also been resolved, delivering a smoother, more stable experience. The gameplay, mechanics, and tension you remember are untouched. Everything around them got a serious upgrade.

What’s New in the Remastered Edition

Rebuilt from Unreal Engine 4 to Unreal Engine 5, the Remastered edition brings a substantial visual and technical overhaul to the entire game:

  • Lumen Dynamic Global Illumination and Fully Overhauled Lighting – Lighting has been reconstructed using UE5’s rendering pipeline. Shadows and atmosphere now respond dynamically to the environment, turning every corridor into something genuinely oppressive, with stronger mood definition and greater visual consistency across every location.
  • Reworked Environmental Assets – Props, architecture, and vegetation rebuilt with higher-resolution models, materials, and textures throughout the entire game.
  • Upgraded Character Models – The full cast has been refined with improved fidelity and material quality, preserving the original artistic direction.
  • Polished Cinematics – In-game cutscenes reworked to a modern production standard.
  • Redesigned User Interface and Menus – Rebuilt for clarity, readability, and a contemporary look.

The gameplay, mechanics, balance, and feel of the original are completely untouched.

Key Features

  • Psychological Horror With Real Stakes – The Remothered saga expands with new layers of lore: returning players will find answers; new players will find a story that stands on its own.
  • Realistic Survival Horror – The Ashmann Inn is full of resources, but dangers lurk around every corner. Scavenge carefully, think ahead, and use what you find to stay alive.
  • Stealth and Action on Your Terms – Slip through the shadows, create diversions, or confront threats head-on. The Ashmann Inn rewards players who stay smart, not just fast.
  • Challenging, Grounded Puzzles – Nothing is arbitrary. Every puzzle is rooted in the world, with solutions that make sense within the logic of the Inn and its dark history.
  • A Cast That Goes Deeper – Fan-favorite characters return alongside new faces, all drawing from the DNA of classic horror to build a roster that feels both familiar and unsettling.
  • Real-Time Cinematics – Fully animated in-engine cutscenes bring the characters and world to life with a level of immersion the series had never reached before.
  • Haunting Original Soundtrack – Music by Luca Balboni (Remothered: Tormented Fathers, Mine, Watch Them Fall) sustains the dread from the first corridor to the final confrontation.

Story

The truths buried in the Ashmann Inn will not be discovered easily: its many mysteries are intertwined and guarded by the looming threat of the stalkers, powerful hunters trapped in time and the confines of its walls.

Survival will take more than just quick reactions as a strategic and resourceful approach will quickly become critical in this haunting adventure. Be smart, as knowing the best time to sneak, flee or fight imminent dangers can quickly make the hunters become the hunted.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/remothered-broken-porcelain-remastered-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Remothered: Tormented Fathers Remastered announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

The first chapter of the cult survival horror saga, rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5.

Stormind Games has announced Remothered: Tormented Fathers Remastered for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, GOG, Microsoft Store). A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Stormind Games:

About

Remothered: Tormented Fathers Remastered is the first chapter of the cult survival horror saga, rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5 to deliver a new level of visual fidelity, atmosphere, and immersion, with legacy bugs resolved and everything you already loved left exactly as it was.

What’s New in the Remastered Edition

Rebuilt from Unreal Engine 4 to Unreal Engine 5, the Remastered edition brings a substantial visual and technical overhaul to the entire game:

  • Lumen Dynamic Global Illumination and Fully Overhauled Lighting – Lighting has been reconstructed using UE5’s rendering pipeline. Shadows and atmosphere now respond dynamically to the environment, turning every corridor into something genuinely oppressive, with stronger mood definition and greater visual consistency across every location.
  • Reworked Environmental Assets – Props, architecture, and vegetation rebuilt with higher-resolution models, materials, and textures throughout the entire game.
  • Upgraded Character Models – The full cast has been refined with improved fidelity and material quality, preserving the original artistic direction.
  • Polished Cinematics – In-game cutscenes reworked to a modern production standard.
  • Redesigned User Interface and Menus – Rebuilt for clarity, readability, and a contemporary look.

Key Features

  • Multiple Survival Approaches – The endless combinations of game dynamics make the experience available to every gamer: stealth, action, strategic, hide ‘n run. Deceive your stalker and block him in another area of the house. Attack your enemy and make your items more powerful. Carefully study your stalkers’ behaviors and their paths. Don’t get too close to your enemy: act like an unperceivable shadow, hiding yourself from his sight. Or just mix these dynamics together.
  • Psychological Plot – Characters in the story are everyday people who turn themselves into scary monsters.
  • Cinematic Direction – The game unfolds like a psychological thriller, with complex and humane characters and movie-like cutscenes.
  • Audio Clues – Use the soundtrack and the 3D audio sound effects to understand when your stalkers are getting closer.
  • No Health Bars – Your body is the only way to understand how you are doing.
  • Realistic Puzzles – Environments and characters have been conceived to be realistic and credible.
  • Haunting Soundtrack – Composed by Nobuko Toda (Final Fantasy, Halo, Metal Gear Solid) and Luca Balboni (Mine, Watch Them Fall).
  • Real-Tme Loading – Explore the mansion without worrying about empty moments or boring loading times.

Story

Rosemary Reed, a sharp and determined 35-year-old woman, arrives at the isolated home of Richard Felton under false pretenses. She is there to uncover the truth about Celeste, a young girl who simply vanished. The nurse Gloria watches over the aging, ailing Felton. But the moment Dr. Felton realizes why Rosemary is really there, the hunt begins. What follows is a web of obsession, buried secrets, and psychological horror where the line between victim and monster is never where you expect it.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/remothered-tormented-fathers-remastered-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Famitsu Sales: 6/22/26 – 6/28/26
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Star Fox opens at 41,680 retail copies sold.

Famitsu has published its estimated physical game software data for Japan for the week of June 22, 2026 to June 28, 2026.

Star Fox for Switch 2 was the highest selling game and new release of the week, opening at 41,680 retail copies sold.

On the hardware side, Switch 2 sold 24,879 units, the PlayStation 5 family sold 9,896 units, the Switch family sold 7,068 units, and the Xbox Series family sold 361 units.

Get the full sales charts below.

Software Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. [SW2] Star Fox (Nintendo, 06/25/26) – 41,680 (New)
  2. [NSW] Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream (Nintendo, 04/16/26) – 28,543 (1,410,570)
  3. [NSW] Powerful Pro Baseball 2026-2027 (Konami, 06/11/26) – 16,950 (146,335)
  4. [SW2] eFootball Kick-Off! (Konami, 06/03/26) – 6,483 (41,508)
  5. [SW2] Pokemon Pokopia (The Pokemon Company, 03/05/26) – 5,870 (1,069,925)
  6. [SW2] Mario Kart World (Nintendo, 06/05/25) – 4,521 (2,979,306)
  7. [NSW] Medabots Card Robattle RB Kabuto Ver. / Kuwagata Ver. (Imagineer, 06/25/26) – 4,348 (New)
  8. [NSW] Blackish House ←sideZ -Retour- (Edia, 06/02/26) – 4,114 (New)
  9. [SW2] The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales (Square Enix, 06/18/26) – 4,077 (27,751)
  10. [NSW] Minecraft (Microsoft, 06/21/18) – 3,353 (4,229,124)

Rankings 11 to 30 will be announced on July 3.

  1. [PS5] Villion: Code (Compile Heart, 06/25/26) – (New)
  2. [PS5] The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales (Square Enix, 06/18/26) –
  3. [SW2] Yoshi and the Mysterious Book (Nintendo, 05/21/26) –
  4. [SW2] Kirby Air Riders (Nintendo, 11/20/25) –
  5. [NSW] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  6. [PS5] 007 First Light (IO Interactive, 05/27/26) –
  7. [SW2] Final Fantasy VII Rebirth (Square Enix, 06/03/26) –
  8. [NSW] Splatoon 3 (Nintendo, 09/09/22) –
  9. [NSW] Animal Crossing: New Horizons (Nintendo, 03/20/20) –
  10. [NSW] Super Smash Bros. Ultimate (Nintendo, 12/07/18) –
  11. [SW2] Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Nintendo, 01/15/26) –
  12. [NSW] Mario Kart 8 Deluxe (Nintendo, 04/28/17) –
  13. [SW2] Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV (Nintendo, 07/24/25) –
  14. [SW2] Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (LEVEL-5, 06/11/26) –
  15. [NSW] Nintendo Switch Sports (Nintendo, 04/29/22) –
  16. [NSW] Super Mario Galaxy + Super Mario Galaxy 2 (Nintendo, 10/02/25) –
  17. [NSW] Clubhouse Games: 51 Worldwide Classics (Nintendo, 06/05/20) –
  18. [SW2] Momotaro Dentetsu 2: Anata no Machi mo Kitto Aru – Higashi Nihon Hen + Nishi Nihon Hen – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition (Konami, 11/13/25) –
  19. [NSW] Super Mario Party Jamboree (Nintendo, 10/17/24) –
  20. [NSW] It Takes Two (12/08/22) –
  21. [SW2] Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park (Nintendo, 03/26/26) –
  22. [PS5] EA Sports UFC 6 (Electronic Arts, 06/19/26) –
  23. [SW2] Mario Tennis Fever (Nintendo, 02/12/26) –
  24. [NSW] Pokemon Scarlet / Pokemon Violet (The Pokemon Company, 11/18/22) –

Hardware Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

  1. Switch 2 – 24,879 (5,965,379)
  2. PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – 8,797 (1,332,982)
  3. Switch OLED Model – 4,030 (9,597,288)
  4. Switch Lite – 2,553 (6,984,496)
  5. PlayStation 5 Pro – 832 (365,206)
  6. Switch – 485 (20,302,623)
  7. PlayStation 5 – 267 (5,920,949)
  8. Xbox Series X – 180 (328,017)
  9. Xbox Series S – 133 (342,607)
  10. Xbox Series X Digital Edition – 48 (32,503)


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/famitsu-sales-6-22-26-6-28-26
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Panzer Knights: Commander’s Edition launches August 13
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Gameplay overview trailer released.

Anime-inspired tank simulation game Panzer Knights: Commander’s Edition will launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on August 13, publisher PQube and developer Joy Brick announced. A physical edition will be available for PlayStation 5.

Panzer Knights first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on October 6, 2020, followed by a full release on May 19, 2021.

This special console edition is the “definitive version” of the game, bundling together the base game with three additional bonus content packs featuring the tanks M4-748 Sherman, M26 Pershing, Churchill VII, Valentine XI, Panzer VIII Maus, and Elefant.

Here is an overview of the game, via PQube:

About

Take command of a German Panzer platoon and lead your forces through the chaos of World War II in this gripping tank simulation that blends hardcore strategy with anime-inspired visuals. Engage in explosive third-person combat across the battlefields of Europe, where every round counts. Load specialized ammunition, target enemy weak points, and call in tactical support as you adapt to the ever-changing situation on the front line.

Between missions, assemble an elite tank crew by handpicking recruits with unique skills, and deploy a formidable arsenal of meticulously detailed tanks, each with their own characteristics, strengths, and vulnerabilities.

In a conflict where victory is achieved through cunning, adaptability, and precision, do you have what it takes to emerge triumphant?

Key Features

  • Iconic Battles – Embark on an action-packed campaign, from the Battle of France to Operation Barbarossa. Smash through defensive lines, seize vital objectives, and repel ferocious counterattacks.
  • Explosive Tank Combat – Clash with Allied armor in high‑stakes skirmishes. Use the terrain to your advantage, load specialized shells, and exploit weak points to immobilize and destroy your targets.
  • Tactical Decisions – Manage your tank’s vital systems, deploy smoke screens, call in air support, and organize your platoon’s formation in real-time to gain the upper hand.
  • Crew Selection – Build an elite team from 30 eager recruits. Level up their skills, discover their backstories, and experiment with different loadouts to increase your combat effectiveness.
  • Extensive Tank Roster – Visit the garage to grow your arsenal. From the nimble ‘Panzer III’ to the mighty ‘Tiger I’, each tank features unique stats, armor profiles, and authentic camouflage patterns.
  • Flexible Gameplay Modes – Test your skills in challenging bonus missions to gain rewards for upgrading your crew and garage, or jump straight into the action with the customizable ‘skirmish mode’.
  • Bonus Tanks Included – Includes three additional bonus tank packs! Take command of the US army’s “M4-748 Sherman” and “M26 Pershing,” field the British “Churchill VII,” and “Valentine XI,” and deploy the Axis’s long-range tank destroyer “Elefant” and super-heavy “Panzer VIII Maus.”

Watch a new trailer below.

Gameplay Overview Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/panzer-knights-commanders-edition-launches-august-13
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Monster Hunter Outlanders third closed beta registration now available
item.content:encoded:
Sign-ups for open-world survival game Monster Hunter Outlanders‘ third closed beta test are available now via the official website until July 24, TiMi Studio Group and Capcom announced. The test itself will begin on August 7. It will be playable across iOS and Android.

Here are the details:

About the 3rd Closed Beta Test

As with the previous round, Closed Beta Test 3 will accept applications through two categories: a General Participant category and a Content Creator category. The Content Creator category is open to creators who regularly produce content, are interested in Monster Hunter Outlanders, and keen to enjoy the game with their community. Video streaming and social media posts showcasing gameplay experience are highly encouraged in sharing their adventures with the community. For full eligibility requirements and selection criteria for each category, please refer to the application guidelines.

This test will feature new radiant monsters and additional hunters that have newly appeared since the Closed Beta Test 2 held in May 2026, as well as the implementation of improvements outlined in the optimization plan shared following the previous test.

Application Details

  • Application Period
    • Thursday, July 2, 2026, 14:00 CEST to Friday, July 24, 2026, 07:59 CEST
  • Supported Platforms and Operating Environment
    • iOS – iPhone XR or above / iOS 17 or above
    • Android – Snapdragon 845 or above / Android 12.0 or above
    • The development team is working to optimize performance ahead of the official launch. For this test, we will continue to carefully evaluate supported devices as part of our optimization efforts.
  • Eligible Countries / Regions
    • Japan, United States, Canada, Germany, United Kingdom, France, Philippines
  • Test Period
    • Test Start Date / Time – Friday, August 7, 2026, at 04:00 CES
  • How to Apply
    • Please complete the questionnaire via the application form.
      • General Participants
      • Creators
    • You may apply to either the General or Creator category, or to both.
  • Eligibility
    • Selected applicants will be contacted via the email address provided at the time of application.

Watch a new trailer below.

3rd Closed Beta Test Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/monster-hunter-outlanders-third-closed-beta-registration-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Silver Palace ‘Dichotomy’ beta test gameplay showcase
item.content:encoded:
• PC

The curtain rises on a pageant of human nature laid bare.

Publisher Elementa and developer Silver Studio have released a three minute gameplay showcase video of the “Dichotomy” beta test for fantasy adventure open-world action RPG Silver Palace, which will soon be available for PC. Registration is still available.

Silver Palace will be available for console, PC, iOS, and Android. A release date has yet to be announced. Read more about the game here.

Watch the video below.

Dichotomy Beta Test Gameplay Showcase

English

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/07/silver-palace-dichotomy-beta-test-gameplay-showcase
